name: Beet-Orange-Apple Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Fresh Beets with Greens (About 1 Bunch)
2 Unpeeled Granny Smith Apples - Thinly Sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely shred beet greens to measure 2 cups. Set aside.
2. Leave the root and 1 inch of stem on each of 2 beets; reserve the remaining beets for another time. Scrub with a brush and set aside.
3. Place beets in a small saucepan and add water to cover. Bring to a boil. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer 20 minutes or until tender. Drain and let cool.
4. Trim off beet stems and roots, and rub off skins. Cut each beet into 8 wedges. Set aside.
5. Peel and section the orange over a medium bowl, reserving juice and membranes; set sections aside.
6. Squeeze membranes over the bowl to extract juice. Discard membranes.
7. Add orange sections, beets, and apples. Toss gently and set aside.
8. Combine oil, vinegar, sugar, salt, and minced garlic in a jar. Cover and pour over beet mixture. Toss well.
9. Arrange 1/2 cup shredded beet greens on each of 4 salad plates. Top with beet mixture; sprinkle with sunflower seeds.
10. Serve at room temperature or chilled.
